What makes us different

Not another fitness app.
A structured accountability system.

Most apps give you tools. Commit gives you a system. One that adapts to your life, holds you accountable and makes following through feel inevitable.

What you receive

01

Personalized Plan

Built around your goals, schedule, and energy. Not a generic template. Your system, designed for how you actually live.

02

Tailored Accountability

Structured check in rituals that keep you honest, grounded, and moving forward. Even on the hard days.

03

Real Progress

Track momentum that compounds. See your streaks, patterns, and growth. Evidence of what you're becoming.

The journey

The 90 Day Commit Experience

Twelve weeks Recommended to Anchor Your Habits. One identity shift.

Week 01

Clarity

Define exactly what you're committing to and why it matters to you right now.

Week 02

Stability

Build the daily rhythm that makes showing up feel natural, not forced.

Week 03

Momentum

The compound effect activates. Habits start holding themselves.

Week 04

Identity

You don't just do the habit, it becomes part of how you live.

The process

Simple by design.

Step 01

Answer a few questions

Tell us about your goals, lifestyle, and what's held you back before.

Step 02

Get your plan

Receive a tailored roadmap built around how you actually live.

Step 03

Start your routine

Day one begins. Short, intentional, and built to fit your real life.

Step 04

Stay consistent

Tailored check-ins, streak tracking, a human coach to check on you and automations to keep you on track.
